title: DeathSpec
description: A plugin that puts you in spectator mode instantly upon death - right at the point of death.
body:
![Deathspec](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fd9c5238da7d5f5f2383c4c7f0ab465145bba38.png)

A plugin that puts you in spectator mode **instantly upon death - right at the point of it.**

There is a lot of functionality, allowing you to:
1. Toggle and Customize any plugin message in the config, adjusting both content and color!
2. Control the time before ban
3. Unban every player, that gets banned by plugin - **just with command!**
4. And **much more!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MYt3BaofVmk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Permissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd8c1d6121f7f0585ff7c7b78b9ada7e6ae6c45a.png)
1. **deathspec.reload** - Allows you to reload plugin's config
2. **deathspec.pardon** - Allows you to unban players by "/deathspec pardon" command.
3. **deathspec.check** - Allows you to check "fake bans" in Banlist.

![Permissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7db080a216c1d263635ea36c45799238ae232db.png)
1. **/deathspec reload** - Reloads plugin's config.
2. **/deathspec pardon <playerName> | all** - Unban player, that was banned by plugin.
3. **/deathspec check** - Check banlist for fake bans
